series_id: HISTHPI (FHFA All-Transactions House Price Index for Hawaii)
title: All-Transactions House Price Index for Hawaii (annual average of quarterly, 1980Q1=100)
frequency: quarterly (annualised here as Q4 of year)
limitations: Repeat-sales index; new construction is excluded by construction.
State-level only; intra-state divergence (Honolulu vs Maui vs Big Island) is not captured.
FHFA HPI tracks home-price *appreciation* across all transactions, including those with conforming GSE financing — its sample skews against jumbo/cash-only segments common in luxury Honolulu.
Annual values here are the Q4 reading of each year (year-end snapshot); Q-over-Q noise within the year is not propagated.
